'''mafaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foeticide|foeticide]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foeticide|foeticide]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mafaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæfæbæth|mæfæbæth]] || [[word:mæfæbæj|mæfæbæj]] || [[word:mæfæbæsh|mæfæbæsh]] || [[word:mæfæbæ|mæfæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mafafabath|mafafabath]] || [[word:mafafabaj|mafafabaj]] || [[word:mafafabash|mafafabash]] || [[word:mafafaba|mafafaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mafabath|mafabath]] || [[word:mafabaj|mafabaj]] || [[word:mafabash|mafabash]] || [[word:mafaba|mafaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mafafbath|mafafbath]] || [[word:mafafbaj|mafafbaj]] || [[word:mafafbash|mafafbash]] || [[word:mafafbaf|mafafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mafabatha|mafabatha]] || [[word:mafabaja|mafabaja]] || [[word:mafabasha|mafabasha]] || [[word:mafabaka|mafabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mafabath|mafabath]] || [[word:mafabaj|mafabaj]] || [[word:mafabash|mafabash]] || [[word:mafaba|mafaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mafabathal|mafabathal]] || [[word:mafabajal|mafabajal]] || [[word:mafabashal|mafabashal]] || [[word:mafabakal|mafabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mafabathatha|mafabathatha]] || [[word:mafabajaja|mafabajaja]] || [[word:mafabashasha|mafabashasha]] || [[word:mafabaka|mafabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mafabathan|mafabathan]] || [[word:mafabajan|mafabajan]] || [[word:mafabashan|mafabashan]] || [[word:mafabakan|mafabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mafabathaoro|mafabathaoro]] || [[word:mafabajaoro|mafabajaoro]] || [[word:mafabashaoro|mafabashaoro]] || [[word:mafabakaoro|mafabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
